topStories.title: Norm-breaking SpaceX IPO a source of elation, angst on Wall Street
topStories.summary: SpaceX is poised for a historic IPO, aiming to raise $75 billion with a $1.8 trillion valuation. Despite immense investor excitement and Musk's visionary appeal, skeptics question the rocket maker's profitability, citing significant AI investments and substantial losses despite revenue growth. The IPO's performance could significantly impact future tech listings.

topStories.title: OpenAI expects to go public 'within the next year,' the Information reports
topStories.summary: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman indicated an IPO within the next year, with the company having recently filed confidentially. While a timeline remains undetermined, Altman noted that rapid advancements in AI's self-improvement capabilities could influence the timing of a public offering. OpenAI is also preparing for a tender offer at its current share price.

topStories.title: Gold slides 3% as Middle East escalation fuels inflation, rate-hike concerns
topStories.summary: Gold prices dropped over 3% as escalating U.S.-Iran tensions fueled inflation and interest rate hike fears. Investors awaited key U.S. data, including the Producer Price Index, to gauge the Federal Reserve's monetary policy. Despite recent consolidation, inflation and central bank buying continue to support gold.

topStories.title: US stocks slump after fresh sell-off in tech stocks; Nasdaq down over 1%
topStories.summary: Wall Street's major indices declined as weakness in technology stocks and escalating US-Iran tensions overshadowed inflation data that met expectations. Investors reassessed AI-related valuations, while geopolitical risks and concerns over prolonged higher interest rates dampened overall market sentiment.

india.title: Decoding SIR impact in West Bengal
india.summary: The post-SIR polls in West Bengal saw the BJP secure a decisive victory, with AITC chief Mamata Banerjee alleging electoral manipulation.
